startPoint.en: Enter a barrier on the lowest level of Pollnivneach Slayer Dungeon. (via → )
startPoint.es: Entra en una barrera en el nivel más bajo del Pollnivneach Slayer Dungeon. (a través de →)

items.name: Full slayer helmet
items.display: Full slayer helmet, slayer helmet, masked earmuffs or face mask. Having a slayer helmet stored on the slayer helmet stand also works.

items.name: Leaf-bladed sword
items.display: Leaf-bladed sword, spear or slayer staff with runes for slayer dart spell

rewards.display: 4,000 Slayer experience (1,000 experience after every boss kill, with four boss monsters to kill)

rewards.name: Cave crawler
rewards.display: Ability to enter four rooms, each room filled a certain creature: Cave crawlers Basilisks Turoths Kurasks

text.es: Entra en el pozo de Pollnivneach.

text.en: In the room with mighty banshees, pass the mystic barrier to the southwest and climb down the stairs. The quest is just about killing 4 bosses in their specific locations. Below is a recommended order.
text.es: En la sala con los mighty banshees, atraviesa la barrera mística hacia el suroeste y baja las escaleras. La misión consiste básicamente en matar a 4 jefes en sus ubicaciones específicas. A continuación se muestra un orden recomendado.

text.en: Use Slayer Dart and Protect from Melee prayer. If you stand far away from the Mightiest turoth, it will use Ranged-based attacks on you. Ignore the minions.
text.es: Usa Slayer Dart y la oración Protect from Melee. Si te mantienes alejado del Mightiest turoth, usará ataques basados en Distancia contra ti. Ignora a los secuaces.

text.en: If you choose to use melee, do not forget to bring a leaf-bladed spear or sword.
text.es: Si prefieres usar melé, no olvides llevar una leaf-bladed spear o sword.
Usa las mismas estrategias que arriba.

text.en: Use melee and wield the mirror shield.
text.es: Usa melé y equípate el mirror shield.

text.en: Use Protect from Magic prayer. Also watch your stats as they will be drained with each attack. Bring a restore potion.
text.es: Usa la oración Protect from Magic. Además, vigila tus estadísticas, ya que se reducirán con cada ataque. Lleva una poción restauradora.

text.en: Take a dose of Super strength potion and Super attack potion, a Combat potion, or Super warmaster's potion to help.
text.es: Toma una dosis de Super strength potion y Super attack potion, una Combat potion, o Super warmaster's potion para ayudarte.

text.en: Monstrous cave crawler (NE - top right barrier)
text.es: Monstrous cave crawler (NE - barrera superior derecha)

text.en: Use melee and Protect from Ranged prayer. The poison from its ranged attack severely reduces the duration of any antipoison potions, including super antipoison. Every second or third hit poisons the player even with potions. An anti-poison totem will not work.
text.es: Usa melé y la oración Protect from Ranged. El veneno de su ataque a distancia reduce drásticamente la duración de cualquier poción antiveneno, incluida la super antipoison. Cada segundo o tercer golpe envenena al jugador incluso con pociones. Un anti-poison totem no funcionará.
